proposals.reasoning: Pure ATM short on the index maximizes vega exposure to the variance risk premium at 45d, a tenor not covered by the killed 30d ATM short.
Sells index OTM variance to harvest the tail/variance risk premium, with wider 0.2-delta strikes than any tried cell so the realized-vs-implied gap is paid on the convex wings.
Harvests the broad-index variance risk premium, the most robust and persistent in the data, at a longer tenor than the killed 30d cell to capture more premium per roll.
Short-tenor 21d index strangle harvests the steepest theta-rich segment of the variance premium term structure, untested versus the killed 30d/0.25 cell.
Put credit spread on the index earns carry plus the long_rich skew premium, with tighter 0.3-delta shorts and 45d tenor differentiating it from the killed 30d/0.25 cell.
Captures the tech-index variance risk premium at 45d, where implied consistently exceeds realized on the most liquid equity-index underlier after SPY.
Defined-risk short index variance harvesting VRP plus the long_rich skew premium, with closer 0.3-delta shorts and longer 45d tenor distinct from the killed 30d/0.25 cell.
Sells the rich index downside put skew while financing with cheap calls, harvesting the well-documented equity skew risk premium at strikes and tenor distinct from the killed cell.
Harvests the steep tech-index put-skew premium (crash-insurance overpricing) via short_rich skew at 0.3-delta/45d, unexplored on QQQ.
Harvests the index variance risk premium, which is densest per-unit-time at the shortest tenor where realized rarely matches the implied vol that insurance-seeking investors overpay for.
Captures the elevated variance risk premium of a high-IV single name whose options are bid up by leveraged retail call demand, with short-dated ATM theta richest.
Monetizes the steep index put skew / tail-insurance premium by selling the far-OTM strike investors systematically overpay for crash protection.
Defined-risk capture of the index variance premium with wings priced rich from skew, isolating overpaid bodyvol at the short tenor.
Sells the inflated variance premium of a crowded high-vol name where implied consistently exceeds realized outside earnings jumps.
Earns the tech-index variance risk premium at the short ATM tenor where time-decay carry is greatest relative to realized.
Defined-risk harvest of QQQ variance premium with rich skew-priced wings at the high-carry short tenor.
Collects the mega-cap variance risk premium where liquid options carry persistent implied-over-realized spread absent idiosyncratic events.
Sells the expensive OTM tail in a high-skew name where lottery-seeking call buyers and crash hedgers both inflate wing premium.
Harvests the persistently upward-sloping index vol term structure (contango) by owning cheaper far vega against rich near-dated decay.
